dialog: See, Neura? You stopped before it was too late.
But the monster said I could get 100% accuracy! I wanted to be perfect!
You preferred to be good enough at everything rather than perfect at a little. It's the smartest move for an intelligence.
So learning doesn't mean memorising? It means understanding general patterns?
Exactly. The real world is full of new dots you have never seen. You have to generalize. Congratulations, you have completed your first lessons!
